calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Feb-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Brenda Hutcherson.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jalisa Wills is present.
Attorney Steven Chan representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties request a settlement protected date of FEB-04-2013 in order to get another signature on the settlement agreement.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is continued to FEB-04-2013 for settlement protected date.
